programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: The New Girl
programme.desc: When her sister Monica suddenly disappears under suspicious circumstances, Malorie becomes convinced that Monica's seemingly perfect husband is hiding something sinister. She then launches her own investigation and unearths a twisted web of lies, abuse, and even political conspiracy. Malorie must confront dangerous secrets that not only threaten her sister's life but her own.

programme.title: Call Her King

programme.title: The Climb

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. programme.title: The Legend of Doc Mays
programme.desc: Follows the story of Dwayne “Doc” Mays, born in North Carolina and raised in Chicago by his streetwise mother. After the death of his mother when he was 8 years old, he found himself a ward of the foster system, ultimately leading to a life on the streets and of crime. When he meets his future mentor “Street” he would rise to be one of the most notorious gangsters in Chicago’s history of organized crime.

programme.title: Induced
programme.desc: An expectant couple heads to a remote cabin to have a natural childbirth, but comes under attack from a predatory midwife who will stop at nothing to snatch their unborn child from them.

programme.title: The Struggle
programme.desc: A story about Debra and her daughter, Tracey struggling in the heart of Memphis. Debra tries to keep her daughter out of danger and off the streets but it doesn't help with the surrounding of drug dealers, pimps and prostitution. It gets worst when Erin and her gang interfere in situations with Tracey and Kandi. That's when Tracey takes matters in her own hands.

programme.title: The Struggle 2: The Dilemma
programme.desc: Darnell gets released from jail and tries to take back control of his territory. Now that Tracey has left and moved to Atlanta with her mom...her sister Stacey is seeking revenge.

programme.title: The Housekeeper
programme.desc: After the death of her son, Sharease Smalls loses everything, and is forced to move back in with her sister Elise. Struggling to find steady work, Sharease agrees to become a live-in housekeeper for a local crime boss, Zues. The pairs professional relationship soon turns intimate, but it’s only a veil of secrets and lies. Will Sharease survive the truth?

programme.title: Evil Born AKA 12/12/12
programme.desc: A new mother learns that her infant son is the spawn of Satan, following a series of mysterious deaths.

programme.desc: An authentic videotape reveals the shocking account of history's most infamous demonic possession.

programme.desc: A couple plans a weekend at a mountain resort and are stalked by the man's evil twin.

programme.title: Almighty Thor
programme.desc: When demon god Loki steals the Hammer of Invincibility, Thor must strike a mighty blow to stop armageddon.

programme.title: Battle Star Wars
programme.desc: An evil Coalition leader threatens to destroy a Rebel planet. His daughter joins the Rebels against him.

programme.title: It Hatched
programme.desc: A couple moves from Nashville to a remote fjord in Iceland in search of peace and serenity. Their plans are horrifically altered when an ancient demon escapes from under their basement floor and Mira gives birth to an egg.

programme.title: Little Dead Rotting Hood (Edited Version)
programme.desc: For years, the old woman in the woods has secretly kept the wolves of the forest at bay. But when the woman dies, the creatures suddenly attack the residents of a nearby small town. As more and more people turn up dead, the townsfolk discover something far more sinister than wolves lurking in the backwoods, and fight to save their home from evil by waging a bloody battle against the ruthless creatures. But as the wolves begin to overpower the town, only the womans granddaughter may have the key to stopping the bloodbath before its too late.

programme.title: Dead Mary (Edited Version)
programme.desc: It was supposed to be the perfect weekend away... until they invited a bloodthirsty party crasher!

programme.title: Hatchet III
programme.desc: In the epic third installment of Adam Greens slasher franchise, Marybeth (Danielle Harris, Halloween) uncovers the true secret to stopping the voodoo curse that has left the ghost of deformed maniac Victor Crowley (Kane Hodder, Friday the 13th) stalking the New Orleans bayou for decades. An entire police department, paramedic response team, and heavily armed S.W.A.T. unit face off with the iconic monster in this action-packed and explosive horror comedy. Hatchet III is full of stunts and jaw dropping gore effects that raise both the bar and the body count of the previous two films put together. Also starring genre favorites Zach Galligan (Gremlins), Caroline Williams (Texas Chainsaw Massacre 2), and Derek Mears (Friday the 13th 2009 and Predators).

programme.title: It Hatched
programme.desc: A couple moves from Nashville to a remote fjord in Iceland in search of peace and serenity. Their plans are horrifically altered when an ancient demon escapes from under their basement floor and Mira gives birth to an egg.

programme.title: Wildling
programme.desc: Anna's teen years take on a terrifying twist when she realizes the monster she feared as a child may be all too real. Liv Tyler, Brad Dourif and Bel Powley star.

programme.title: At the Devil's Door
programme.desc: A demonic entity terrorizes a group of young women while seeking a body to call home in this supernatural horror thriller. Co-starring Naya Rivera and Ashley Rickards.

programme.title: Mon Mon Mon Monsters
programme.desc: A group of boys discover two flesh-eating creatures. One of the creatures is able to get away, but they capture the other one. They soon realize letting the first one escape was a mistake.

programme.title: All Hallows' Eve
programme.desc: A babysitter finds a VHS tape which features various sinister murders performed by a psychotic clown.

programme.title: All Hallows' Eve 2
programme.desc: A woman finds a VHS tape that shows a series of gruesome tales that could be real. But the true danger is the pumpkin-faced killer that's using the tape to find his next victim.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Turkey Day" - Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it; Mrs Drysdale hires some Indians to take a Thanksgiving picture, which puts Granny on the warpath.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Go Hollywood" - When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Are Overdrawn" - The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett, while he gets their statement and starts to spend their money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampette Look" - Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven. That only reinforces the Clampett's belief that the Fenwicks are poor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: With Sitting Bull at the Spirit Lake Massacre
programme.desc: A long-thought-lost film finally surfaces after being unseen for over eight decades. Created and copyrighted by Sunset Productions in 1925 but not released until June 15, 1927, this silent epic features the superior Native American actor Chief Yowlachie (performing here under the name Chief Yowlache) as Sitting Bull. Other fine actors in the cast include the always popular Bryant Washburn and a young Bob Steele, who appears under his real name Bob Bradbury Jr. The story takes place in the 1860s or 1870s near Spirit Lake, Iowa. Settlements of whites are growing in that region but the Sioux Indians also have professed their interest in one such settlement. Chief Sitting Bull surveys the settlement at Spirit Lake from afar and with the advice of the Great Spirit vows to retake the land that belonged to his fathers.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest chef Christian Petroni brings his energy to the kitchen to cook Rigatoni Alla Vodka except he swaps the vodka for red wine. The crew debates "sauce versus gravy," discusses the proper saltiness of pasta water, and reveals the foods they absolutely despise. The episode ends with a giveaway of Christian's cookbook.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Halloween season, and Carla Hall is making her Banana Pudding Trifle in portable mason jars. She skips the traditional Nilla wafers for buttery Chessmen cookies to keep the crunch. The hosts chat about their favorite Halloween costumes, debate the merits of kitchen gadgets, and deal with Michael's impatience over Carla's loud mixer.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The Halloween celebrations kick off with guest Jeanette Donnarumma, former culinary producer for The Rachael Ray Show. Clinton Kelly attempts a spooky "Cheese Rat" appetizer made from cream cheese, curry powder, and mango chutney. The group laughs at the questionable rat shape, shares TV producer behind-the-scenes stories, and Jeanette shakes up an Apple Cider Margarita spritz.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's cozy comfort food season as Michael Symon cooks a hearty Beef and Butternut Squash Stew. While the meat braises, the hosts share their favorite podcasts to listen to while doing chores, universally bash the idea of the "Turducken", and discuss the possibility of a future Chewed Up cookbook.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's finally Halloween. Michael dresses up as a giant Minion while Carla Hall makes festive Graveyard Dirt Cups. Using a rich chocolate mousse, crushed cookies, and gummy worms, it's the perfect spooky dessert. The trio debates the merits of candy corn, reminisces about retro sweets, and Michael shares a hilarious story of chasing down an ice cream truck.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon whips up crispy homemade tater tots with a rich gruyere fondue dip. While frying the tots, the trio gets delightfully derailed when Michael accidentally misspeaks, leading to uncontrollable laughter. A grumpy Clinton complains about his restless legs, Carla relives a past cooking competition disaster, and the group answers fan mail about holiday crafts. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly embraces "sweater weather" by making a savory Butternut Squash, Spinach, and Blue Cheese Pie. While he cooks, the hosts discuss expensive clothing habits and the woes of tight pants. A cooking question about pie layers hilariously derails into a conversation about dating terminology, and Michael reveals he is passing the Thanksgiving hosting torch to his son. The episode concludes with Michael giving away a lucky golf putter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Carla Hall is making a comforting Peach Cobbler Pound Cake mashup. While Carla bakes, Michael Symon annoys Clinton Kelly with a deafening hand mixer. The trio discusses their favorite childhood holiday cookies, passionately debates whether black-and-white cookies are actually good, and shares ideas for crazy food mashups. The episode ends with a giveaway of a custom-designed apron from Carla.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly dodges cooking duty by bringing in guest Chef Leah Cohen to tackle a fan's fridge. Leah whips up incredible Chicken Lettuce Wraps using ground chicken, hoisin, and leftover rice. The hosts talk Pop-A-Shot basketball, picky kids, and Michael gives away a very meaningful piece of his restaurant history.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes on the Fan Fridge challenge, cooking from Pat in Peoria's refrigerator. He prepares a beautiful Pan-Roasted Salmon with crispy skin, served alongside a bright Greek-inspired salad of avocado, cucumber, olives, feta, and red curry paste. The crew jokes about Nick's organizing skills and reads fan mail.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Fan Fridge Week wraps up on Friday as Carla Hall transforms leftovers into a decadent Banana Bread French Toast. Using cottage cheese, oat milk, and eggs for a rich custard, she tops the sweet treat with a tart lemonade reduction, fresh berries, and chocolate syrup. The hosts discuss taking the show on the road in a van.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts celebrate their 25th show milestone with guest Chadwick Boyd, who elevates the classic Green Bean Casserole with caramelized onions, fresh beans, and a gruyere drop biscuit topping. While the casserole bakes, the crew debates mashed potato techniques, and Michael shares a hilarious story about how an AI misread his pan wall photo. A fan wins a Caraway pan set.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: A Fan Fridge rescue mission unfolds when a hypothetical Thanksgiving goes wrong. Michael Symon saves the day using Tammy's fridge ingredients to create a savory skillet of chicken thighs, Italian sausage, and sweet peppers. Meanwhile, the hosts share their current TV binges, Michael explains the meanings behind his tattoos, and Clinton sings "Brandy" for a fan. The episode wraps with a giveaway of Carla's measuring bowls.

programme.title: Recipe Club: The Podcast
programme.desc: Recipe Club: The Podcast - Flavored Vodka - Chris is joined by guests Rachel Khong and Priya Krishna to dabble in the dark arts of flavored vodka. The Recipe Club isn’t afraid of the oft-mocked genre of spirit, but rather embraces it in the name of home cookery.

programme.title: Recipe Club: The Podcast
programme.desc: Recipe Club: The Podcast - Sweet Potato Pie - Dave and Chris are joined by special guest Malcolm Livingston II to take a deep holiday dive into sweet potato pie. Malcolm shares a remarkable recipe he developed (you will be a holiday hero if you make this!), which Dave tries to make in the microwave in less than 15 minutes, and Chris challenges himself to make handmade agar-agar for his version.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: We're back! It's the long-awaited return of Recipe Club, this time with some new rules. This season's host, extraordinaire Chris Ying, is joined by Chef and competitor Dave Chang to give an overview of how this season will be different: they talk about the new format, reveal episode themes, and Dave scopes out some of his competition. In this episode, the stage is set. In the next episode, the competition of Recipe Club Season 4 begins!

programme.title: Majordomo Cookbook Club
programme.desc: Majordomo Cookbook Club - Caramelized Milk Chocolate with Plantain Brittle and Sticky Rice & Mango Ice Cream: Adrienne Borlongan of Wanderlust Creamery—one of the most popular (and buzziest) ice cream chains in LA—stopped by the studio to show how she makes two different ice creams: Caramelized Milk Chocolate with Plantain Brittle, and the flavor that put Wanderlust on the map—Sticky Rice & Mango!

programme.title: Majordomo Cookbook Club
programme.desc: Majordomo Cookbook Club - Korean Tangerine Salad with Chile: Deuki Hong and Matt Rodbard stopped by the studio to share some of their fantastic recipes from Koreaworld: A Cookbook! Check out this Jeju Tangerine Chile Salad...a crisp, refreshing, tangy dish with some (adjustable) heat.

programme.title: Majordomo Cookbook Club
programme.desc: Majordomo Cookbook Club - Priya Krishna's Dahi Bhalla & Shortcut Profiteroles: New York Times food reporter and bestselling cookbook author Priya Krishna came by the studio and prepared two recipes from her new cookbook for kids, Priya's Kitchen Adventures. She makes shortcut profiteroles inspired by her time in Paris, plus dahi bhalla, essentially fritters soaked in yogurt and topped with all kinds of chutneys. Yum!

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Chilaquiles; Warm Artichoke Salad; Ants Climbing a Tree - Andrew makes a delcious Mexican breakfast classic, chilaquiles, and a simple warm artichoke salad, then Chris joins him in the kitchen to make "Ants Climbing a Tree" (Ma Yi Shang Shu), a classic Sichuan dish consisting of glass noodles in a delicious sauce with ground pork and chopped scallions.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Caesar Salad & Fettuccini Alfredo: Chris and Andrew cook two inviting recipes from the Classic Comforts menu of Dinner Time Live: Creamy fettuccine Alfredo and a Caesar salad packed with umami. These classics are a comforting and exceptional balance of heavy and light that will put you at ease.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Pan Roasted Salmon with Caper Butter Sauce, Green Beans & Potato Rösti - Andrew prepares another delicious meal from the Classic Comforts menu of Dinner Time Live: Pan roasted, dry aged salmon with a caper butter sauce, and a buttery potato rösti, basically a fancy-sounding Swiss-German term for hash browns.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Honey Butter Popcorn" - Chris shares his go-to popcorn recipe that is delicious, simple, and perfect for family movie night!

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: Cooking School - David Chang Makes 5 Easy Recipes Using His New Korean BBQ Sauces: David Chang shows off some of his favorite ways to use his new Momofuku Korean BBQ Sauces, including a vinaigrette salad dressing that he makes two different salads for, a simple beef & broccoli recipe, Dakdoritang (spicy chicken stew), Gamja Jorim (Korean braised potatoes), and a deliciously easy steak sauce.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Brandon Jew's "MSG" Fried Chicken" - Chef Brandon Jew, owner of Michelin-starred Mr. Jiu's in San Francisco's Chinatown, shares his recipe and techniques for making his "MSG" (mushroom/seaweed/garlic) Fried Chicken, inspired by the original fried chicken recipe from his grandfather's restaurant, The Four Seas.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Pork and Chive Dumplings with Chris Ying" - Chris Ying has made a lot of dumplings in his day. In fact, he always keeps a batch in the freezer for whenever the kids need a quick dinner. Today, he shares his go-to pork dumpling recipe, including two quick sauces.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie takes Beth -- a mom, a full-time labor and delivery nurse, and a grad student -- under her wing. Ellie helps Beth rein in her takeout habit with three easy make-ahead recipes that stock her fridge with a week of tasty meals. Recipes include Blueberry-Chia Overnight Oats, Turkey-stuffed Pizza Pockets, Cajun Shrimp in Foil, and Red Wine Salad Dressing.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: The key to having chocolate in your life in a manageable way is to go for quality over quantity. In this episode, we visit the Chocolate Expo and Ellie demonstrates how to incorporate the joys of chocolate into everyday menus, clarifying how to take advantage of its health benefits. Recipes include Fig & Ginger Truffles, Double-Chocolate Waffles a la Mode, Mocha Java Smoothie, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Inez's extreme approach to carbs has left her not only feeling tired, but stressed from making separate meals for herself and her family. Ellie helps Inez bring balance to her home, by dispelling misinformation about carbs and sharing healthy recipes she can enjoy with her family. Recipes include Whole Grain Penne with Chicken, Mushrooms & Spinach, Basil Pesto with Spaghetti Squash, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: We all love cheese--who doesn't? But there can be too much of a good thing. Ellie answers an SOS from a home where cheese has completely taken over the menu. Ellie, a cheese lover herself, shows how to keep from going overboard with cheese and instead utilize its best assets—its great flavor and health benefits. Recipes include Skillet Mac and Cheese, Parmesan-crusted Chicken Breast, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie tackles the challenge we all face every day--what's for breakfast, especially in a busy household when everyone is out the door like a pool ball break. She helps out Mary, a mom and an elite athlete and coach, who literally hits the ground running each morning. Recipes include Make-ahead Mini Frittatas with Leeks and Asparagus, Morning Glory Baked Oatmeal, PB and Grapes Wrap, and more.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie visits a busy office where stress has led to junk food snacking and fast-food lunching. Armed with photos of sugary office treats submitted by one office employee to solicit her help, Ellie shares tasty alternatives to fight back. Recipes include Herbed Farro Salad with Chicken, Walnuts, Feta and Spinach, Asian Chicken Wrap, and Buffalo Chicken Salad.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: There's a gluten-free explosion these days, but how much of it is real and how much of it is hype? Ellie demystifies the gluten issue once and for all with the help of her stepbrother and yoga instructor David Wilder, who has celiac disease. In this episode, Ellie also underscores just how many foods are naturally gluten-free, with recipes that will satisfy everyone. Recipes include Multigrain Pancakes, Steak au Poivre Salad, Roasted Salmon & Fennel with Lemon & Thyme, and more.

programme.desc: Ricks got nothing against cerveza and margaritas, but Rick wants to explore another side of Mexican drinking: wine. Mexican wine. And no, that is not a misnomer. In fact, the burgeoning craft of Mexican wine is growing in unusual places.

programme.desc: Journey to the end of the world in Argentina, The Land of Fire. After meeting with the indigenous Selk'nam people, we arrive in Ushuaia, a city that travelers dream of. programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Animals
programme.desc: This is all about Animals! Includes children's favorites “Alice the Camel”, “Let’s Go To Zoo” and More!

programme.title: Over The Deep Blue Sea - Puppets - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Yo-ho-ho! Review different types of weather while climbing aboard a pirate ship with the Super Simple Puppets! We’re going this way, that way. Forwards, backwards. Up and down, up and down. Over the deep blue sea.

programme.title: Five Little Chicks - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Five Little Chicks is great for nap time and for practicing counting down from five. Try singing along when it’s time for a nap.

programme.title: Rosey & The Rowdy Rustlers Tour Bus - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers are coming to town to kick off their concert tour! But while driving out on the open road, a giant stray tumbleweed gets in the path of their tour bus, making a mighty mess! Rosey, Roxie, and Rude Jenny will have to take a detour to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers’ vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! The band leaves as happy customers, and just in time for the concert!

programme.title: Who Took The Cookie? (Finny the Shark) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny’s friends are playing a game of Who Took The Cookie From The Cookie Jar. Who do you think took the cookie? The seahorse, the starfish, the octopus, the walrus, the dolphin, or the crab? Let’s play and find out!

programme.title: Moolissa The Underwater Cow - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny’s class finds out they have a new special friend coming for a visit, a cow named Moolisa! Being from land, it can be tricky for Moolisa to do everything that Finny’s friends do in the sea, but Moolisa will try her best to share in all the experiences of life in the ocean.

programme.title: Five Little Monsters Jumping On The Bed - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a silly and slightly spooky version of the classic kids’ rhyme, Five Little Monkeys, with monsters instead of monkeys. It’s a great song for practicing counting down from five, and for teaching little monsters (and children!) not to jump on the bed.

programme.title: Red Light Green Light - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Tobee learned all about traffic safety in school today! He learned how to walk in a crosswalk, to look both ways before crossing a street, and what the colors of a traffic light mean. That reminds Caitie of a song about stopping and going called “Red Light, Green Light.” Together, they sing and dance, stopping and starting again and again. Tobee and Caitie have a blast, and you can join the fun, too! Green light!

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Weepy French Onion Soup - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic Collection 1

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A wedding spins into chaos as a giant ring escapes, but Big Wing’s catch saves the day and unveils a joyful bride. Later, Jett and Golden Boy use Cross Combo power to tame a hungry dino plant and rescue Golden Girl and Runi.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a kite to a boy named Akas in the Himalayas, who wants to fly it in a kite festival. Red Pandas take off with the kite and Jett pursues them. When he runs into trouble and gets pinned under a rock, Dizzy shows up with her rescue gear to save the day.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Venice, Italy with a mask for Luca to wear at his masquerade party. Jett and Luca set out on a gondola to deliver the invitations, but when they run into a waterway traffic jam, Paul must show up to unclog the canal traffic.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Princess Maribelle from England asks for sparkly collars for her puppies to wear at her royal tea party. When the puppies escape and run every which way through the garden, Jett and Jerome join forces to round them up.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Riley from Hollywood is directing his first action film. Jett brings an alien mask and ends up acting as the monster. Riley’s demands get out of hand, so Jerome comes to co-star and help him bring about a peaceful ending.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes a pair of running shoes that light up to Lorna in Kenya. She’s going to run in a big race. While training she crosses paths with a lost baby wildebeast. Bello comes to play a game and reunite the baby with its parents.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett has a feathered headdress for Camila from Brazil. She’s dancing the samba in a Carnival parade. Jerome comes to help her with her dance moves and Jett uses his Jett Speed to fix Camila’s float when it suffers a breakdown.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Drew in Canada asks for ice skates so that he can play on an ice hockey team. When he gets to the rink he’s so nervous that he can’t play. Former Mountie Grand Albert gives Drew confidence-boosting tips so he can score the big goal.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Yuri from Russia is part of a family circus. He needs a unicycle for his act on the high wire. The rest of the family is on their way when the circus train breaks down. Jerome performs an amazing act for the crowd while Jett goes to help them.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Karl from Norway asks for a Viking helmet. He goes to Viking Camp where Jett is mistaken for a dragon. The campers chase Jett onto a ship that heads for a waterfall. Mira comes and pushes them away from disaster.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Martine in Paris, France needs a cake-decorating machine. Her father the baker asks her to ice a giant cake for a party at the Eiffel Tower. When the cake is ready the traffic is terrible. Dizzy flies the cake through the sky over the city.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Vietnamese sisters Sen and Kim are fans of pop star Kellie. They ask for wigs like the one their idol wears. When Kellie’s van gets stuck in a rice paddy, Dizzy comes to lead the way to the concert and the sisters are Kellie’s special guests.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes brushes to Willem in The Netherlands who is going to paint a mural on a sea wall. When the mural is almost done, a storm approaches. Jett and Donnie borrow the propeller from a windmill to dry the painting before it is ruined.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jerome thinks Jett’s job is easy so he takes his place. He delivers a bathtub to Nayan in Thailand. Boonying the elephant takes a bath but is startled by a spray of water and runs off. Jett arrives to help bring Boonying back.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett carries tires to Alex and his sister Adriana in Monaco. They’ve built a hot dog car for Alex to ride in a soapbox derby. When ducks cause him to run off the course and into town, Paul comes and leads him back with a police escort.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a battery to Noah in Denmark, who’s built a dinosaur out of plastic blocks. When they power it up the dinosaur escapes and runs through the town. Donnie comes and builds another robot to confront the dinosaur and remove his battery.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a microphone to Ruby, a girl in Australia who hosts her own nature program. She interviews animals until a kangaroo snatches her microphone. Bello comes and plays leapfrog with the kangaroo and Ruby gets it all on tape.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus Nursery Rhymes For Children - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Wheels on the bus is a nursery rhymes that little babies love! Come join Little Treehouse as they sing, dance in this fun kids educational video with our version of the classic wheels on the bus called the wheels on the bus and many more preschool rhymes for babies like rain rain go away, row row your boat, head shoulder knees and toes and many more

programme.title: Top 10 Nursery Rhymes - Kids TV
programme.desc: Kids songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join us, as they sing along, dance in this fun kids videos. Learn preschool songs like This is the way, Old Macdonald, Humpty Dumpty, Five little babies, Twinkle Twinkle, Wheels on the Bus, Finger Family and more.

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus & More Nursery Rhymes - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Welcome to the mystical and of the Little Treehouse! where you are take non magical nursery rhymes journey. Kids will laugh, dance, sing, and play along with our video, learning kids songs like I spy song, to market to market, animals sounds song, mary had a little lamb, row row row your boat and much, much more while enjoying our friendly characters.

programme.title: Road Rangers Car Cartoons
programme.desc: Enjoy Road Rangers popular family friendly kids stories & adventure Nursery Rhymes for babies and toddlers. Your children will learn essential lessons like problem solving, working together, family bonds along with numbers, colors, shapes, abc and much more in this popular tv kids adventure series.

programme.title: Wheels On The Garbage Truck + More Nursery Rhymes - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Hey Kids, Little Treehouse is back with more nursery rhymes for toddlers that you will enjoy. Wheels on the Garbage Truck is here to take you on a fun ride where we sing-along, dance and have fun.Come join in this preschool adventure and enjoy it with your friends. Little Treehouse has some amazing animated learning videos and more baby rhymes collection like,Who Stole My Toy, Happy Elephant, Chew Your Food, Doctor Checkup Song, Swimming Song, Peek A Boo, Rock a Bye Baby and many more Kindergarten Songs.

programme.title: Farmees Movie Compilation
programme.desc: Farmees brings you the best of nursery rhymes and kids songs. Your kids are sure to enjoy!

programme.title: Dinobees Funny Cartoon Show for Kids
programme.desc: Welcome to #Dinobees, a funny show for kids. It revolves around a family that discovers and adopts three dinosaurs. programme.title: Super Supremes Dinosaur Song & More Kids Songs
programme.desc: The kids are so excited to learn about dinosaurs. Here is a collection of our best videos.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's take-over. Dulcy tells them they can and takes Sonic and Sally to the Floating Island where they find the "Time Stones".

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: On a trip to Port Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia are told that ships are sinking due to the Mobian sea-beast.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A captain of the Queen's guard is captured before he can reach the secret rendezvous where he was to meet Queen Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Momma escapes again from the Mobius Home for Really Bizarre People, disowns Robotnik for failing to capture Sonic, then with the help of an obscure Mobius law, adopts Sonic!

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outerspace to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When a Rebel Base is threatened by Robotnik, Sonic and Tails team up with Big Mike and Da Bears to run a booby-trapped gauntlet in their gigantic Road Warrior-like truck.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Brandon Quark, an evil half-man, half-duck genius challenges, then teams up with Robotnik to capture Sonic. But Sonic knows their weakness, and pits the Badnik geniuses against one another, and sets himself free.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic plays Cyrano to bring Robotnik Jr. and Breezie together. The problem is, Breezie's crazy about Sonic. So Sonic gets out of the way, but when he does, Junior is captured by Robotnik, and Breezie comes to the rescue, finally falling for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play, a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The Baby Berrykins are enthralled by a fairytale that Blueberry reads to them for Story Time. Charmed by their reaction, Strawberry suggests that the girls do a "berrytale play" for the kids, sort of a "Story Time On Stage." Plum volunteers to direct it. She envisions a small, simple production-until she hears about a gigantic production of "Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins" that's a smash hit in Berry Big City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance - and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake has always dreamed of seeing a certain rare flower, which only blooms once every ten years - and then only for a day!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: When Strawberry gets an urgent plea to return to Oz, she finds that there's an environmental disaster.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is abuzz as Berrykin Bloom introduces the biggest, juiciest, strangest fruit anyone has ever seen! It's the size of a house, shaped like a strawberry, colored like a watermelon and has a spiky pineapple top. "I call it the sparklestrawwaterpineberry!" says Berrykin Bloom. Princess Berrykin declares it the greatest achievement in Berryculture she's ever witnessed.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry's fashion podcast is saved by Apple, then almost sabotaged by Sweet and Sour when Lemon's "mood hair" runs amok, acting like the bickering twins, and the twins' comical argument is accidentally broadcast on the "berrynet."

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Sour wishes she could have a birthday all her very own, her twin sister Sweet grants her wish by forgoing celebrating her birthday. But what begins as a day that Sour has always dreamed of quickly becomes a disappointment when she misses her twin. With Strawberry's help, Sour gives her birthday back to Sweet with a special surprise.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When a comedy of errors causes Orange, Plum and Cherry to arrive late to their campout, they start off their annual tradition of telling tall-tales around the campfire.

programme.title: Zoboomafoo
programme.desc: Chris, Martin and Zoboo discover creatures with incredible hearing.

programme.desc: Chris and Martin devise a plan to attract two African crown cranes to Animal Junction.

programme.title: Zoboomafoo
programme.desc: Things get messy when three muddy dogs descend upon Animal Junction.

programme.title: Zoboomafoo
programme.desc: A beaver gnaws his way through Animal Junction looking for wood so he can build his dam.

programme.title: Zoboomafoo
programme.desc: A flying squirrel glides into Animal Junction in search of a hole to live in.

programme.title: Zoboomafoo
programme.desc: For the Kratts, playtime is fun time, but for creatures, playtime is practice.

programme.desc: The gang catalog the things that make creatures itchy and try some remedies.

programme.title: Zoboomafoo
programme.desc: Flying isn’t just for the birds, there are other creatures that can take flight.

programme.desc: We may not understand what they are saying, but all animals talk to each other.

programme.desc: River otters arrive at Animal Junction and the gang gets in the swim of things.

programme.title: Zoboomafoo
programme.desc: Zoboo and the Kratt brothers discover the difference between hot and cold climates.

programme.title: Zoboomafoo
programme.desc: A sandstorm has buried Animal Junction, which is perfect for many animals who visit.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Everyone loves Barney! When Ryan tries to be just like Barney, he has a hard time filling Barney's shoes. Ryan soon learns that he is special when he's just being himself! Barney's friends are having a hard time deciding what to do because everyone wants to do the same thing! Barney's Native American tale, The Chase, shows them that it's best to think for themselves and not follow the crowd.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and Riff help Baby Bop learn how to follow the rules and learn that rules make games fun for everyone! Baby Bop is having one of those days! Every time she turns around, someone is telling her no! As her frustration grows, Barney explains that the word no can help you avoid making mistakes or getting hurt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: There's a fishing contest in the park! When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells The Emperor's Contest and Ryan discovers that honesty is the best policy. A talented young artist is painting a portrait of Barney, but when she steps away, BJ takes credit for it. When the others beg him to teach them to paint, BJ admits the truth and learns that honesty is the best policy!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: An ordinary game of hide and seek takes a not-so-ordinary turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park! BJ thinks that his sister may be seeing things but Barney takes this opportunity to help the young dinos learn about their sense of sight. When Riff meets a friend who can't hear well, Riff wonders if he would still like music. Barney tells everyone about Beethoven, a famous musician who wrote beautiful music even though he couldn't hear it.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ feels left out when the kids have a Dog Show to show off their pets. BJ doesn't have a dog and wishes he did! A friend shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun. Barney sees Riff protecting a nest full of duck eggs. Together, they leave the eggs to look for food for when the ducklings hatch. When they return, Riff is pleasantly surprised to find the eggs have cracked open and the baby ducklings have hatched!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bops blankey seems to be getting smaller; shes convinced its shrinking. But Barney shows her that, actually, she is growing. | Baby Bop isnt satisfied with her skills. She wants to play keyboard like Riff and wants to skate like Barney.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: While playing in the caboose, BJ is surprised to learn that The Land of Mother Goose truly exists. Several Mother Goose characters have come to ask for help! | BJ hurts his toe while pretending to be Captain Pickles.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. Barney and Riff help her learn how to follow the rules and Baby Bop learns that rules make games fun for everyone! BJ hurts his toe while pretending to be Captain Pickles. When Barney suggests he rest in the caboose, BJ becomes frustrated, as hed rather be outside playing. Barney reminds him of the wonderful world of books, and the little dinos decide to write a book of their ownbased on the exciting true-life adventures of Captain Pickles!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJs enthusiastic efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Barney helps BJ learn that everyone makes mistakes. Together with his friends, BJ cleans up the mess he made on the caboose. Baby Bop cant wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip so she can have Barney and the park all to herself! But, once theyre gone, she discovers she misses them more than she expected and the more time that goes by, the more she misses them! Barney shows Baby Bop ways to keep friends close in our hearts while theyre away.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ, Baby Bop and Riff can hardly wait for the petting zoo that is coming to the park. Barney helps them pass the time while teaching them about the days of the week. When the animals finally do arrive, everyone realizes that it was all worth the wait! Riff feels terrible when he accidentally wrecks BJs beloved scooter. BJ loved that scooter more than almost anything! Riff and Baby Bop decide to have a sale in the park to raise money to buy BJ a brand-new scooter.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective, and needs a mystery to solve! A case quickly comes his way when something nibbles on one of Baby Bops healthy snacks. BJ, Barney, and Baby Bop uncover several clues along the way and soon realize the culprit is someones pet rabbit. Barney sees Riff protecting a nest full of duck eggs. Together, they leave the eggs to look for food for when the ducklings hatch. When they return, Riff is pleasantly surprised to find the eggs have cracked open and the baby ducklings have hatched!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: While playing in the caboose, BJ is surprised to learn that The Land of Mother Goose truly exists. Several Mother Goose characters have come to ask for help; parts of their rhymes are missing! Mother Goose arrives and fixes the problem, and all of the Mother Goose characters return home. BJ and Baby Bop hope to visit them soon. When Baby Bop catches Barney, BJ, Riff and some children wrapping a mysterious present in the caboose, she just cant wait to see what is in the box. Barney suggests they listen to a story while they wait. Baby Bop finally gets to open her present and realizes that sometimes waiting is a good thing!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop isnt satisfied with the things she can do. She wants to play the keyboard like Riff and wants to be able to skate like Barney. Nobody can cheer her up, until she unexpectedly gets the whole park dancing and she realizes there are things she can do, too! When a wheelchair-bound child is unintentionally neglected by his friends, Barney steps in to help. He gently reminds the others to include the child by showing them that even Barney feels excluded sometimes. It isnt always easy being a big, purple dinosaur. In the end, everyone is included for a day of fun!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Jamal has never danced before and is too shy to try. On the day of the big dance party in the park, Barney and his friends introduce Jamal to many kinds of dance. Barney assures Jamal that he can do anything he puts his mind to even dance. With Barneys help, Jamal finally finds his groove and has fun dancing with his friends! Barney tells Baby Bop the story of The Princess Without a Song to Sing. In this original fairytale, Baby Bop imagines herself as the sad little princess trying to find her unique song. Barney, BJ and Riff all become characters in the story, each sharing their songs and revealing an element of song, sound, rhythm and feeling. With their help, the princess finds her song and is delighted to sing it for her friends!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff cant find his drumsticks anywhere. He knows he had them when he visited various neighborhood locations with Barney earlier in the day. Barney magically recreates neighborhood spots to help refresh Riffs memory. Happily, Barneys strategy is a success and Riff finds his drumsticks. Along the way, everyone learns that the most important part of a neighborhood is the people who live there! Barney helps Baby Bop explore many different jobs. At the end of the day, Baby Bop has several different careers to consider for when she grows up. But for now, shes happy just being three!

programme.title: Eagles of Mercy
programme.desc: EAGLES OF MERCY recounts a seldom-told chapter in the World War II narrative, picking up in the opening moments of D-Day. In the early hours of June 6, 1944, two young American medics with the 101st Airborne Screaming Eagles parachuted into France, and soon found themselves trapped in a 12th-century Norman church in the small village of Angoville-au-Plain. Medics Robert Wright and Kenneth Moore provided first aid to the first casualties of D-Day while a savage battle raged outside between American and German forces. During the documentary, Wright and Moore recount the rigors of basic training, parachuting into Normandy ahead of the amphibious landing on Utah Beach, surviving German anti-aircraft artillery and carrying on their life-saving work even when their unit retreated. EAGLES OF MERCY supplements these compelling stories with newsreel footage, re-enactments and interviews with fellow medics and residents of Angoville.

programme.title: Fannie's Last Supper
programme.desc: Join culinary expert Christopher Kimball and his team of test kitchen sleuths as they attempt to recreate an authentic turn-of-the-century 12-course dinner. For two years, Kimball painstakingly researched and tested recipes from The Boston Cooking School Cook Book, written in 1896 by Fannie Farmer. Tracking down unusual ingredients, discovering forgotten techniques and battling a finicky wood stove are just part of the fun as the pressure builds for the crew to pull off a perfectly-orchestrated meal for their distinguished guests.The project required the team, lead by head chef Erin McMurrin, to constantly regulate the heat on a cast-iron wood stove and work in the Victorian-era kitchen without the benefit of modern appliances. The courses they prepare include: rissoles (filled and fried puff pastry), mock turtle soup with fried brain balls, lobster lAmricaine, roast goose with chestnut stuffing and jus, wood-grilled salmon, roast saddle of venison, Canton punch, three molded Victorian jellies and a spectacular French-inspired Mandarin cake.This special details not only the cooking and serving of the dinner itself, but travels back in time to investigate the life of Fannie Farmer and the world of Victorian cooking, including the foods, the cookware, and the kitchens in an effort to connect the present to the past.

programme.title: We Hold These Truths: The Global Quest for Liberty
programme.desc: This lively documentary explores the promise and global influence of Americas expression of freedom, the Declaration of Independence. Since 1776, more than 100 nations have declared their independence, modeling their declarations on Americas. From Vietnam to Venezuela, from Prague to Hong Kong, millions of lives have been touched by the ideals written in this enduring document. Host Douglas Ginsburg, Federal Judge on the U.S. Court of Appeals, D.C. Circuit, interviews leading experts and ordinary citizens from around the world. In Paris, at the Palace of Versailles, he meets a descendant of the Marquis de Lafayette. In Prague, he tours a cold war bunker and learns that the Czech Republic's journey toward independence mirrors the three great waves of independence that swept the world in the twentieth century. He meets immigrants from Hong Kong, Venezuela, and Vietnam, all seeking the ideals of Life, Liberty and the Pursuit of Happiness. In the United States, Judge Ginsburg travels from Philadelphia to Baltimore to New York and beyond to learn how the words of the Declaration influenced the abolitionist movement, the Women's Suffrage movement, and iconic civil rights figures like Frederick Douglass and Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. WE HOLD THESE TRUTHS is a revealing and fascinating look at this extraordinary and enduring document.

programme.title: Remember Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: The focus of this film is on the military and civilian survivors of Pearl Harbor, all of whom had totally different experiences onDecember 7, 1941.

programme.title: Omaha Beach: Honor and Sacrifice
programme.desc: OMAHA BEACH: HONOR AND SACRIFICE shows the very personal stories of several veterans as they return to Omaha Beach and documents the celebration in Normandy that continues to this day as a result of their acts of courage and determination on June 6, 1944.On D-Day, a roughly 7,000-yard stretch of beach in Normandy, France given the code name Omaha proved to be the Allies' biggest obstacle to the success of Operation Overlord. The assignment to take Omaha Beach, establish a beachhead, and move inland into France was given to two American divisions the already battle-hardened 1st Infantry Division (The Big Red One) and the untested 29th Infantry Division (The Blue and the Gray), who had yet to see any combat in World War II.American Naval Combat Demolition Units also hit the beach that day, writing their own individual stories of horror and heroism. Seven decades after the Boys of Omaha Beach landed, many veterans are returning to this part of the Normandy coast for the last time. Other soldiers who were there on D-Day have also come back for the first time since that historic day, looking for closure as they enter the final years of their lives.

programme.title: War Journal: The Incredible World War II Escape of Major Damon Rocky Gause
programme.desc: The thrilling true story of a nearly impossible escape from prison camp during World War II. In 1942, American airman Rocky Gause escaped a prison camp on the Bataan Peninsula, swam to nearby Corregidor Island, and then sailed with U.S. serviceman William Osborne in a leaky fishing boat 3,200 miles from the Philippines to Australia. Despite facing typhoons, constant threats from Japanese ships, submarines and airplanes, a lack of water and food, and even a visit to the worlds largest leper colony, both men survived to recount their harrowing 52-day ordeal. Filmed in Bataan, Corregidor, and in Manila, the documentary features the journals of Gause and Osborne, archival footage and photos, and interviews with relatives and Army associates. It is narrated by three-time Emmy Award-winning actor Chandler Massey, and actor Kyle Chandler (Argo, Zero Dark Thirty and Carol) provides the voice of Rocky.
